## Summary

Adds a new guided Revise Queue page at `/workbench-v2` while leaving `/workbench` untouched as the reference implementation.

## Added route

- `/workbench-v2?manuscriptId=<id>&evaluationJobId=<id>`

## Changed files

- `app/workbench-v2/page.tsx`
- `components/revision/ReviseQueueV2Client.tsx`

## Untouched reference files

- `app/workbench/page.tsx`
- `components/revision/ReviseWorkbenchClient.tsx`

## Validation status

- Lint command run:
	- `npm run lint -- components/revision/ReviseQueueV2Client.tsx app/workbench-v2/page.tsx`
	- Status: completed with ignore-pattern warnings, no lint errors for edited files.
- Build command run:
	- `npm run build`
	- Status: pre-build guards passed; `next build` exited with `SIGTERM` in container runtime.

## Preview URL

- `https://literary-ai-partner-git-feat-workbench-91f70e-mmeraws-projects.vercel.app/workbench-v2?manuscriptId=7307&evaluationJobId=e39ba4ef-ce0d-45af-ae01-d7380109d33f`

## Known limitation

This PR is a defensive UI prototype for queue presentation and action gating. The upstream admission gate remains a required P0 follow-up so unsupported duplicate findings are reduced before they reach the UI.
